decks.notes: The deck focuses on playing low-cost aggressive creatures with flying abilities, supported by a mix of combat tricks and control spells to maintain board presence and tempo advantage. The combination of evasion and card advantage provided by the creatures enables the player to quickly deal damage to the opponent while also keeping the opponent's board in check. The deck aims to capitalize on its flying creatures to go over the opponent's defenses and win the game before the opponent can stabilize.

The main goal of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with early aggressive creatures and pump spells, utilizing the synergy between creatures such as Badgermole Cub and Mightform Harmonizer. The deck aims to put pressure on the opponent by rapidly establishing a threatening board presence and utilizing cards like Earthbender Ascension and Meltstrider's Resolve to push through damage. Additionally, the deck includes cards like Sazh's Chocobo and Esper Origins to provide additional utility and card advantage. The mana base is designed to ensure consistent access to green mana for casting spells.

The deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with strong creatures and efficient removal spells, aiming to finish the game as fast as possible. By utilizing the synergy between creatures like Badgermole Cub and Sazh's Chocobo, along with powerful combat tricks like Meltstrider's Resolve, the deck seeks to establish early board control and push damage through evasion effects. The inclusion of disruptive spells like Esper Origins and Demolition Field helps to protect our creatures and maintain pressure on the opponent. With a streamlined mana base and consistent card draw, this deck aims to be an aggressive and resilient threat in the Standard format.

This deck focuses on quickly establishing a board presence with efficient creatures and using combat tricks to punch through the opponent's defenses. The key strategy is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures like Badgermole Cub and Pawpatch Recruit, backed up by cards like Practiced Offense and Surrak, Elusive Hunter. Gene Pollinator and Leatherhead, Swamp Stalker provide additional value, while Brightglass Gearhulk and Keen-Eyed Curator help maintain card advantage. The inclusion of tempo plays like Seam Rip and Shardmage's Rescue further solidify the deck's aggressive strategy.

This deck focuses on deploying creatures quickly and efficiently, while also using cheap and versatile spells to control the board and push through damage. It utilizes the synergy between instants and sorceries to enable powerful abilities and create unexpected plays. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a mix of aggressive creatures and disruptive spells, while maintaining card advantage and tempo. Flexibility and adaptability are key components, allowing the player to pivot between aggression and control as needed. The deck's strategy revolves around leveraging the power of spells and creatures in combination to outmaneuver opponents.

The main strategy of this deck is to control the game by utilizing a combination of counter spells, removal, and card draw. Eddymurk Crab, Hearth Elemental, and Sunderflock provide early game defense, while Opt, Prismari Charm, and Sleight of Hand help to maintain card advantage. Impractical Joke and Traumatic Critique disrupt the opponent's strategy, while Burst Lightning and Get Out offer targeted removal. The deck also includes Spell Snare, Spell Pierce, and Winternight Stories for additional control options. The land base includes a mix of Islands, Riverpyre Verge, Spirebluff Canal, Steam Vents, Multiversal Passage, and Stormcarved Coast for mana fixing and versatility.

This deck focuses on controlling the opponent's board through counterspells and removal while slowly building up resources to overwhelm them with powerful spells and creatures. The key strategy involves using efficient removal spells like Burst Lightning and Prsimari Charm to disrupt the opponent's game plan, while utilizing cards like Eddymurk Crab and Hearth Elemental to maintain board presence. By carefully managing resources and timing plays, the deck aims to outvalue the opponent and secure victory through superior card advantage and board control.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly swarm the field with low-cost creatures and utilize their abilities to gain advantage over the opponent. By efficiently ramping up mana with cards like Llanowar Elves and Earthbender Ascension, the deck can quickly provide a threatening board presence. Cards like Meltstrider's Resolve and Mightform Harmonizer help enhance the creatures' capabilities, while cards like Esper Origins and Keen-Eyed Curator provide card advantage. The deck also includes cards like Sapling Nursery and Badgermole Cub for additional utility and resilience. With a focus on aggressive plays and efficient mana usage, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with its fast-paced strategy.

The main idea of this Izzet Control deck is to maintain control of the game through a combination of spells and abilities that allow you to manipulate the board state. By using a mix of removal, card draw, and counterspells, you can disrupt your opponent's strategy while advancing your own game plan. The deck aims to outlast opponents by utilizing a mix of defensive spells and efficient threats to ultimately secure victory. With a focus on tempo and resource management, this deck excels at adapting to various matchups and strategies.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent quickly by playing low-cost aggressive creatures and spells, while also utilizing tempo plays and card draw to maintain pressure. The deck focuses on utilizing a mix of burn spells, counterspells, and bounce effects to disrupt the opponent's game plan and keep them on the back foot. By efficiently managing resources and maximizing damage output, the deck aims to close out the game before the opponent can stabilize or develop their own board presence.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells, while also utilizing card draw and bounce effects to maintain tempo. The key strategy is to constantly apply pressure and efficiently use your resources to control the board and deal direct damage to the opponent. By combining efficient creatures, versatile spells, and strategic land choices, this deck aims to win the game quickly before the opponent can stabilize or mount a comeback.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with fast and aggressive creatures, utilizing powerful support spells and land cards to maintain board presence and push for victory. By ramping up mana with cards like Llanowar Elves and utilizing cards like Earthbender Ascension and Mightform Harmonizer to boost their creatures, the player can quickly build a formidable army and deal significant damage to their opponent. The inclusion of cards like Escape Tunnel and Fabled Passage also allows for flexibility in mana fixing and evasion, ensuring the deck can adapt to different situations.

This deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana with cards like Llanowar Elves and Earthbender Ascension, while utilizing efficient creatures like Badgermole Cub and Sazh's Chocobo to overwhelm the opponent with early aggression. Cards like Mightform Harmonizer and Esper Origins provide additional support and card advantage, while Surrak, Elusive Hunter offers a powerful threat. The deck aims to consistently put pressure on the opponent and maintain board control through a combination of creature synergies and efficient mana usage.

The deck focuses on quick and aggressive creature plays, supplemented by cards that can deal direct damage to the opponent. The key strategy is to establish board presence with creatures like Ashling, Rekindled and Flamebraider, while utilizing spells like Burst Lightning and Winternight Stories to control the board and finish off the opponent. Cards like Deceit and Vibrance provide additional support for the aggressive strategy, making it difficult for the opponent to stabilize. The lands in the deck are optimized for consistent mana production to ensure the deck can execute its game plan efficiently.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly fill up your graveyard with powerful creatures and then bring them back to the battlefield using reanimation spells like Deceit and Superior Spider-Man. By combining these reanimation strategies with cards like Emeritus of Ideation and Doomsday Excruciator, you can create a powerful board presence and overwhelm your opponent. The deck also includes interaction and disruption tools like Duress and Shoot the Sheriff to control the game while setting up your combo. Overall, this deck focuses on the synergy between combo pieces and reanimation to win the game.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures like Callous Sell-Sword and Elusive Otter, backed up by instant spells like Full Bore and Wild Ride to deal rapid damage. Quantum Riddler and Slickshot Show-Off provide additional pressure, while Drake Hatcher creates more creatures for the board. Resource management is crucial, utilizing cards like Secret Identity to draw and maintain momentum. The deck aims to maintain a fast-paced tempo and apply constant pressure to keep the opponent on the defensive.

This deck focuses on controlling the game through a combination of card draw, removal, and board wipes. The key strategy is to stay ahead on resources and disrupt the opponent's game plan while building towards powerful late-game plays. The mana base is carefully constructed to support a variety of spells and abilities, enabling the player to adapt to different situations and maintain control of the battlefield. By consistently denying the opponent advantage and opportunities, this deck aims to outlast and outmaneuver the competition in a battle of attrition.

The main concept of this Azorius Aggro deck is to quickly build a strong board presence with evasive creatures like Momo, Friendly Flier and Sage of the Skies, while utilizing cards like Springleaf Drum to ramp up mana and Quantum Riddler to disrupt opponent's plans. Starfield Shepherd and Haliya, Guided by Light provide protection, while cards like Daydream and Practiced Offense help maintain pressure. The deck aims to close out games swiftly by overwhelming opponents with efficient and versatile threats, while using Multiversal Passage for fixing mana and ensuring consistent plays.

The main focus of this UR Aggro deck is to quickly apply pressure on the opponent with low-cost spells and creatures while maintaining a constant stream of card draw and spell interaction. The deck aims to control the board with bounce effects and counter spells while dealing damage with efficient creatures like Slickshot Show-Off and Eddymurk Crab. Utilizing cards like Burst Lightning and Vibrant Outburst, the deck seeks to overwhelm the opponent with its aggro strategy and tempo advantage, ultimately leading to a swift victory.

The deck focuses on a fast and aggressive playstyle using cards like Eddymurk Crab and Slickshot Show-Off to quickly chip away at the opponent's life total. Burst Lightning and Vibrant Outburst provide additional damage, while Octopus Form can buff creatures and present a threat. Boomerang Basics and Stormchaser's Talent help maintain card advantage and control the board. The mana base supports a consistent mana curve with a mix of Islands and dual lands. Impractical Joke can disrupt the opponent's strategy, giving the deck a flexible toolbox to handle various situations.

The deck focuses on quickly applying pressure to the opponent through a combination of efficient creatures and cheap, instant-speed spells. By utilizing cards like Burst Lightning, Opt, and Stormchaser's Talent, the deck aims to control the board early on while dealing damage to the opponent. Slickshot Show-Off and Drake Hatcher provide strong attacking threats, while cards like Secret Identity and Vibrant Outburst offer versatility and card advantage. The deck aims to close out the game quickly before the opponent has a chance to establish their own game plan.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming your opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells to deal damage efficiently. By utilizing cards like Eddymurk Crab and Slickshot Show-Off to establish early board presence and Burst Lightning to remove threats, you can push through damage and close out games swiftly. The addition of card draw spells like Opt and Sleight of Hand helps to maintain card advantage and ensure you have the resources needed to keep up the pressure. The versatile nature of the deck allows for adaptability in various matchups.

The main idea behind this deck is to control the game by using a combination of counter spells, removal cards, and card draw mechanics. By using cards like Opt, Spell Pierce, and Spell Snare to disrupt the opponent's strategy, while utilizing Eddymurk Crab and Hearth Elemental to maintain board presence and pressure. Traumatic Critique and Impractical Joke can provide additional disruption and card advantage, while Flow State can be used to finish off the opponent. The mana base is designed to ensure consistency and allow for easy access to all colors needed for spells.

The main idea of this Izzet Control deck is to utilize a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and card draw to control the board and outvalue the opponent. Eddymurk Crab, Hearth Elemental, and Sunderflock provide early game defense, while Burst Lightning and Prismari Charm offer removal options. Traumatic Critique serves as a versatile removal spell, while Sleight of Hand and Opt help dig for key cards. Winternight Stories and Impractical Joke provide additional card advantage. The deck aims to stall the game and overwhelm the opponent with its control elements.

The main concept of this Mardu Aggro deck is to flood the board with aggressive creatures like Bloodghast, Marauding Mako, and Iron-Shield Elf, while efficiently removing threats with cards like Burst Lightning and Requiting Hex. Utilizing powerful cards like Carnage, Crimson Chaos and Cool but Rude to maintain board control and pressure the opponent. The deck also takes advantage of the synergy between Practiced Offense and Moonshadow to maximize damage output. By combining fast creatures with strong removal and combat tricks, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent quickly and decisively.

This deck focuses on aggressive gameplay by consistently putting pressure on the opponent with low-cost creatures and spells. The key strategy is to quickly build a wide board presence with creatures like Bloodghast and Iron-Shield Elf, while utilizing combat tricks and removal cards like Cool but Rude and Requiting Hex to maintain board control. The deck also has a slight graveyard recursion theme with cards like Bloodghast and Moonshadow. Overall, the goal is to overwhelm the opponent with fast, efficient threats and end the game before the opponent has a chance to stabilize.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly ramp up mana using cards like Llanowar Elves and Sazh's Chocobo to play powerful threats such as Badgermole Cub and Mightform Harmonizer early in the game. The deck focuses on overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and efficient removal spells like Earthbender Ascension and Meltstrider's Resolve. By using cards like Royal Treatment and Icetill Explorer to generate card advantage, the deck aims to maintain a steady flow of threats while disrupting the opponent's game plan. The land base is designed to ensure consistent color access for the various spells in the deck.

The primary focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy using a variety of creatures and support cards. By utilizing cards that generate mana quickly, such as Llanowar Elves, and efficient creatures like Badgermole Cub and Sazh's Chocobo, the goal is to quickly build up a board presence and pressure the opponent. Combat tricks like Snakeskin Veil and removal spells like Royal Treatment are included to protect and enhance the effectiveness of the creatures. The deck aims to establish dominance early in the game and maintain momentum until securing victory.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and tempo plays, utilizing powerful green creatures like Badgermole Cub and Surrak, Elusive Hunter. The deck also includes ramp through cards like Llanowar Elves and Earthbender Ascension to quickly deploy threats onto the battlefield. The inclusion of cards like Royal Treatment and Meltstrider's Resolve provide additional removal and protection for key creatures. The deck aims to maintain pressure on the opponent while also controlling the board to secure a victory.

The main focus of this deck is to aggressively play creatures and pump them up with spells like [[Earthbender Ascension]] and [[Meltstrider's Resolve]] to overwhelm the opponent quickly. The deck includes mana ramp creatures like [[Llanowar Elves]] and spells to ensure a steady flow of creatures on the battlefield. This deck aims to establish a strong board presence early on and maintain pressure through efficient creatures and combat tricks. It also includes some land support cards like [[Ba Sing Se]] and [[Escape Tunnel]] to ensure smooth gameplay.

The main concept of this deck is to swarm the board with low-cost creatures and pump them up with various cards to overwhelm the opponent quickly. By utilizing cards like Badgermole Cub, Ouroboroid, and Pawpatch Recruit, the deck aims to put pressure on the opponent from the start. Additionally, using cards like Keen-Eyed Curator and Brightglass Gearhulk to buff up the creatures further and protect them. The deck also includes some removal spells like Seam Rip to deal with threats from the opponent. Overall, the key strategy is to maintain a fast and aggressive tempo to secure victory.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy using low-cost creatures like Badgermole Cub and Pawpatch Recruit. By utilizing cards like Surrak, Elusive Hunter and Practiced Offense, the deck aims to deal quick and consistent damage to the opponent. With a mix of creatures, spells like Erode and Seam Rip, and land cards like Abandoned Air Temple and Hushwood Verge, the deck focuses on maintaining board presence and pressuring the opponent early in the game to secure victory.

The deck focuses on utilizing a variety of spells and card draw effects to maintain control over the game. By efficiently managing resources and manipulating the opponent's board state, the deck aims to outvalue and outlast the opponent. It features a mix of removal, card advantage, and versatile spells to adapt to different matchups. The mana base allows for flexibility in casting spells of multiple colors, ensuring consistency and stability in the control strategy. Overall, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while establishing its own dominance and inevitability.

The deck focuses on using evasive creatures with flying like Momo, Friendly Flier and Sage of the Skies, along with powerful support cards like Starfield Shepherd and Cosmogrand Zenith to apply constant pressure on the opponent. This deck focuses on quickly dealing damage to the opponent by utilizing aggressive creatures and efficient spells. The deck focuses on quickly dealing damage to the opponent through a combination of direct damage spells and efficient creatures. It aims to control the board with bounce effects and counter spells, while maintaining card advantage with cantrips and card draw. The key strategy is to apply pressure early, disrupt the opponent's game plan, and close out the game with bursts of damage. The deck utilizes a mix of burn spells, tempo plays, and evasive threats to overwhelm the opponent and secure victory.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming your opponent with aggressive creatures and powerful instant/sorcery spells. By combining creatures like Slickshot Show-Off and Colorstorm Stallion with spells like Burst Lightning and Flow State, you can deal damage efficiently and control the board. Secrets Identity provides protection and card advantage, while Sleight of Hand and Opt keep your hand stocked with spells. Utilizing a mix of land types like Riverpyre Verge and Multiversal Passage ensures you can consistently cast your spells, while the Great Hall of the Biblioplex provides additional utility.

The main concept of this UR Aggro deck is to quickly play and pump up low-cost creatures like Slickshot Show-Off and Eddymurk Crab, while controlling the board with spells like Burst Lightning and Boomerang Basics. The deck also includes card draw and selection through Opt, Sleight of Hand, and Stormchaser's Talent to maintain momentum. The creatures in the deck, like Eddymurk Crab and Drake Hatcher, are used to supplement the burn spells and provide additional threats on the board. The key strategy is to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of direct damage and creature aggression, constantly putting them on the back foot and forcing them to respond to multiple threats at once.

The main idea of this deck is to aggressively control the board with low-cost creatures and spells, while maintaining card advantage and tempo with draw spells like Opt and Sleight of Hand. This Sultai Control deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's strategy and gaining value through card advantage. The deck includes various powerful control cards like Deceit, Wistfulness, and Requiting Hex to deal with threats and outvalue opponents. Superior Spider-Man and Emeritus of Ideation provide additional card advantage, while Quantum Riddler and Overlord of the Balemurk control the board. The deck also includes removal spells like Day of Black Sun and Shoot the Sheriff to deal with threats. The deck focuses on controlling the game by using a variety of spells to disrupt the opponent's strategy and gain advantage. It includes cards that allow you to manipulate your opponent's hand, graveyard, and board state, while also providing card advantage and ways to protect your own resources. The deck aims to outlast the opponent by efficiently managing resources and disrupting their plans, ultimately leading to a victory through attrition and strategic plays.

The deck focuses on utilizing a variety of control elements to manage the opponent's threats and resource advantage. It includes cards that provide card advantage, removal spells, and counterspells to control the board state. The deck also features a mix of versatile spells that can adapt to different situations, along with powerful finishers like Wan Shi Tong, Librarian to close out the game. The deck focuses on using various cards to quickly fill up the graveyard with powerful creatures, then bringing them back onto the battlefield to overwhelm the opponent. It combines cards that allow for discarding and reanimation, along with disruptive spells to control the opponent's resources. The key strategy is to set up the graveyard as efficiently as possible while disrupting the opponent's game plan, and then unleashing a powerful board presence that is difficult for the opponent to deal with.

The main concept of this deck revolves around utilizing various cards to quickly bring powerful creatures back from the graveyard (reanimation) in order to create powerful combos and overwhelm the opponent. Additionally, the deck includes cards that disrupt the opponent's hand and strategy, creating a control aspect to support the combo-reanimator theme. By carefully managing resources and playing strategically, this deck aims to outpace and outmaneuver the opponent to secure victory in a Standard 1 vs 1 format.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly fill the graveyard with creatures and then bring them back onto the battlefield using reanimation spells. By utilizing cards like Deceit and Requiting Hex, along with powerful creatures like Superior Spider-Man and Doomsday Excruciator, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with strong creatures early in the game. The combination of graveyard recursion and creature power helps to establish control over the battlefield, ultimately leading to victory through a well-executed combo strategy.
